10563299.title: Sanditon
10563299.description: Charlotte and Sidney clash again, only for Charlotte to be left confused by a chance encounter. Tensions surrounding Miss Lambe's arrival in Sanditon erupt at Lady Denham's luncheon, and Esther and Edward realise that Clara poses a threat.

10566956.title: Sanditon
10566956.description: Charlotte and Sidney clash again, only for Charlotte to be left confused by a chance encounter. Tensions surrounding Miss Lambe's arrival in Sanditon erupt at Lady Denham's luncheon, and Esther and Edward realise that Clara poses a threat.

10562812.title: Sanditon
10562812.description: Charlotte sets out to avoid Sidney, until an accident forces them together and to reappraise each other. When Tom brings a new doctor to the town, he and Lady Denham clash and Clara makes a bold move in her bid to outplay Sir Edward and Esther.
